title: trachymene humilis subsp. breviscapa
intro: Trachymene humilis subsp. breviscapa, also known as dwarf Trachymene, is a perennial herb native to Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Trachymene humilis subsp. breviscapa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal uses, but further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
